title: Supreme Court seeks Centre, States response on PIL for legally trained professionals to decide land disputes
description: The Supreme Court on Thursday issued notice to the Central and State governments and the Law Commission of India on a public interest litigation (PIL) seeking directions to ensure that land disputes are adjudicated by legally trained professionals, instead of revenue officials without formal legal education. [Ashwini Kumar Upadhyay v. Union of India & Ors]A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Justice Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi was hearing the plea filed by Advocate Ashwini Kuma
